3081710.name: When the king speaks
3081710.description:
"When the King speaks..."
"...His people suffer."
"When the King speaks..."
"A war long forgotten is reignited."

Rykune, an aspiring young Hero on a mundane journey is thrust headfirst in the bloody events of the conflict transpiring in a Kingdom far away.
Though unable to idly standby he takes action, joining a resistance, undertaking the role of WITNESS.
The King's abhorent morals and guidance. The Hidden forces and forgotten conflicts have greased the wheels of war

-An RPG inspired by the industry classics of the 90's
-over 65 recruitable characters!
-A living, breathing, changing world
-Farming, Raiding, Harvesting
-Professionally hand crafted Original Soundtrack
-Over 25 hours of main story and side quests

Save the Kingdom from the King's tyranny and greed!

It's your job, to make a better future.
For you
For Everyone.
3081710.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
